---
title: "International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law MSc Student Conference"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: /assets/logos/logobw.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: graduation-cap
      text: LinkedIn Page
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/company/105939308
    - icon: graduation-cap
      text: MSc Webpage
      href: https://study.ed.ac.uk/programmes/postgraduate-taught/788-international-animal-welfare-ethics-and-law-online-learning

---



:::{#hero-heading}
This is the page for the [International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law MSc](https://study.ed.ac.uk/programmes/postgraduate-taught/788-international-animal-welfare-ethics-and-law-online-learning) Student Conference.

International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law (or IAWEL) is the part-time distance learning MSc at the [Royal (Dick) School of Veterinary Studies](https://vet.ed.ac.uk/) at the [University of Edinburgh](https://www.ed.ac.uk/). We launched in 2012, and since then have awarded over 200 MSc students. While many of our dissertation students go on to publish their theses, we wanted a way to celebrate our students amazing achievements, and in 2026, we ran our first IAWEL Student Conference. 




:::
